  "name": "Kalliope Waverley",
  "age": 38,
  "occupation": "Freelance Children's Party Planner",
  "background": "As a mother of two young children, Kalliope spends most of her days managing the household and taking care of her kids, which leaves her with limited time to follow economic news closely, but she tries to stay informed through social media and online forums. Her husband's job as an accountant has given her a basic understanding of financial concepts, but she often finds herself disagreeing with the Fed's decisions, feeling they don't account for the everyday struggles of ordinary people like her family.",

  "expertise_domains": ["personal finance", "family budgeting"],
  "trusted_sources": ["The New York Times", "CNN"],
